Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: D17
Life Devourer Daggers

When attacking, has a 12% chance of dealing 120% damage in 5 seconds.
For the duration of the battle, damage from the unit's attacks dealt to frozen enemies ignores 35% of the target's armor.
Once in a while, the unit freezes the target of the attack for 3 sec. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear abilities and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec. Also, a small blizzard surrounds the target for 3 sec. Every second, the target and all enemies in a small radius around it have their attack speed reduced by 15% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Also, all targets of the ability take 76800 magic damage every second.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
